message:
test(ft-xbnl0.2.4): unix::next_line_with_cx observes pre-cancel (tick 429)

Pins cx-cancel observation on the `unix::next_line_with_cx` seam.
Unlike the channel primitives which delegate cancel observability to
asupersync's poll_* short-circuit, `next_line_with_cx` is a
runtime_compat-level seam whose sole cancel-observability point is
a pre-flight `cx.checkpoint()` folded into io::ErrorKind::Interrupted:

    cx.checkpoint().map_err(|err| io::Error::new(
        io::ErrorKind::Interrupted,
        format!("next_line cancelled: {err}"),
    ))?;

A regression that removed the pre-flight would leave cancellation
unobserved (the underlying asupersync stream does not itself poll cx)
and calling loops in ipc.rs would pend on the next newline indefinitely.

Test shape:
- Bind UnixListener at a tempdir socket path
- Spawn a task that accepts and holds the connection for 1 s without
  writing (reader pends on new data, never sees EOF)
- Connect a client UnixStream, wrap in BufReader + lines()
- Pre-cancel cx via `cx.cancel_with(User, ...)`
- Wrap `next_line_with_cx(&cx, &mut lines)` in 2 s outer safety-net
- Assert elapsed < 1 s AND Err with ErrorKind::Interrupted and
  message containing "next_line cancelled"

Observed locally: test returns in 0.01 s — the pre-flight short-circuits
before any reader I/O.

Check script Run 6/6 filter extends to include `unix_next_line_with_cx`.
Test counts:

  1/6 HTTP client       : 34
  2/6 TLS               : 45
  3/6 Regression guards :  3
  4/6 Metrics server    :  3
  5/6 Web server        :  2
  6/6 runtime_compat    : 14  (+1 from tick 429)
  total                 : 101

Full check script passes locally via fork bypass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -30,6 +30,7 @@
 #      Semaphore::acquire_owned_with_cx pre-cancel test (tick 427).
 #      The semaphore filter is `semaphore_acquire_` so it catches both
 #      borrow and owned variants.
+#      unix::next_line_with_cx pre-cancel test (tick 429).
 #
 # Exit code 0 on all passing; non-zero on any failure.
 #
@@ -133,7 +134,7 @@ run_test "Run 6/6: runtime_compat primitive contracts (budget + cancel observati
     -p frankenterm-core \
     --features asupersync-runtime \
     --lib \
-    -- --nocapture _with_cx_observes_budget_deadline yield_now_with_cx oneshot_recv_with_cx broadcast_recv_with_cx semaphore_acquire_ mpsc_recv_with_cx watch_changed_with_cx join_set_join_next_with_cx
+    -- --nocapture _with_cx_observes_budget_deadline yield_now_with_cx oneshot_recv_with_cx broadcast_recv_with_cx semaphore_acquire_ mpsc_recv_with_cx watch_changed_with_cx join_set_join_next_with_cx unix_next_line_with_cx
 
 echo
 echo "=============================================================="
